nodes.name: Discord Notification
nodes.notes: OPTIONAL: Add your Discord webhook URL. Delete if not using Discord.

parameters.subject: =🛍️ New Order #{{ $json.orderNumber }} - {{ $json.customerName }} (${{ $json.total.toFixed(2) }})
parameters.html:
LUXE. Admin

New Order #{{ $json.orderNumber }}

Customer: {{ $json.customerName }} ({{ $json.email }})

Total: ${{ $json.total.toFixed(2) }}

Payment: {{ $json.paymentMethod }}

Status: {{ $json.status.replace(/_/g, ' ') }}

Items

{{ $json.items.map(i => ``).join('') }}
ItemQtyPrice
${i.name}${i.variant ? ' · ' + i.variant : ''}${i.qty}$${(i.price * i.qty).toFixed(2)}
Total${{ $json.total.toFixed(2) }}

Shipping to:
{{ $json.shippingAddress.firstName }} {{ $json.shippingAddress.lastName }}
{{ $json.shippingAddress.address }}
{{ $json.shippingAddress.city }}, {{ $json.shippingAddress.postal }}
{{ $json.shippingAddress.country }}

View in Admin Panel →

nodes.name: Email to Admin
nodes.notes: Configure your SMTP credentials in n8n. Change 'admin@luxe.local' to YOUR email.

parameters.jsCode:
// Respond to the webhook immediately
return [{ json: { success: true, message: 'New order notification processed' } }];
